'''Squidge''' was the insulting name given by the [[Vindar]] to the race of beings they oppressed. They were diminutive [[Color/Legends|blue]] creatures with elongated skulls and wavy black patterns on their skin. They spoke a primitive form of [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] and were organized under "den mothers".

Long after the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], two Squidge, [[Remoh (Squidge)|Remoh]] and [[Otalp]], found a broken [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], known to them as the storyteller, in a cave. When Otalp was killed by the Vindar, Remoh picked up a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] he found in the droid's wreckage and determined to bring hope to his people again.
